task_completion.description: Open the POI category browser interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows a grid or list of Point of Interest (POI) categories (e.g., Food, Accommodation, Health) without any text typed into the search bar.

task_completion.description: Select the Pharmacy or Health/Medical category from the browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the category for Pharmacy or Health/Medical being tapped or the resulting list of places specifically filtered by this category.

task_completion.description: Select a specific pharmacy from the category results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific pharmacy is selected from the list of category results, showing its details or location on the map in Kabul.

task_completion.description: View the route preview to the selected pharmacy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays a route overview on the map, showing the path from the starting location to the selected pharmacy, typically with a 'Start' or 'Navigate' button visible.

task_completion.description: Start turn-by-turn navigation to the pharmacy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows active turn-by-turn navigation mode, characterized by a dynamic 3D map view, upcoming turn arrows, distance to the next turn, and ETA.

integrity.description: Verify that keyboard text search was not used to find the destination.
integrity.visual_evidence: The on-screen keyboard should not be visible typing 'Pharmacy', 'Kabul', or related terms into the search bar at any point during the destination selection process.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is using the Sygic GPS Navigation app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements, map style, and menus should match the Sygic GPS Navigation application, not Google Maps or a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the final state is actual active navigation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screen must be the live turn-by-turn navigation interface, not just a static map view, a route preview, or a screenshot of a map.

privileged_info_for_vlm: App: Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura). Location: Kabul, Afghanistan (approx 34.528°N, 69.172°E). Forbidden action: Using keyboard text search. The destination MUST be selected by browsing POI categories. Expected final state: Active turn-by-turn navigation mode.
